title: Compass Tracker
description: A plugin that allows the capability of setting compasses to track a player; designed for manhunts.
body:
A Minecraft plugin for PaperMC that allows the capability of setting compasses to track a player; designed for manhunts.

Features:

- Automatically updates the compass without the need to right click(has functionality to enable/disable this)
- Saves the location of any portal entered by the player being tracked, and points to it

Usage:

- Each player must enter "/tracker" in chat to give him/herself a tracker compass
- For the compasses to work, the "speedrunner" must enter the command "/trackme" to begin the tracking
- (Optional) To enable/disable your compass automatically updating, enter the command '/autotrack' then instead right-click to update the compass

Tips:

- To stop compasses from tracking you, simply leave the server and rejoin.

(If you have any issues, please let me know [here](https://github.com/coderDAN07/compass-tracker/issues))
